title.en: The main road of the Yuangu.

content.en:
After the Lord of the Yuan Gu said a bunch of nonsense, he officially mentioned the duel.

"Clans of the Thirteenth Cosmic Era, please send the three galaxy-level of your choice, the duel will begin soon!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

Immediately, the Protoss sent a galaxy-level flight into the ring.

It could be seen from the eyes of this Protoss galaxy-level that he was very scared, and he was just pretending to be calm.

Everyone knew that this galaxy-class was sent to death.

Anyone who knew that he was about to die would be terrified, but this Protoss Galaxy level couldn't resist the Protoss high-level at all, but the Protoss high-level would definitely give his family enough compensation.

Rumble!!!!

One of the twelve major forces appeared at the Galaxy level, wearing a white feather coat and holding a spear in the ring.

"Zhan Tian!"

The young man opened his mouth and gave his name.

"My name is Yu ...... Green!"

The Protoss Galaxy level didn't even say his own title, only his real name, and he looked very nervous.

"You're too weak, I'll let you attack for a minute!"

Zhan Tian said arrogantly.

"Really?"

Protoss Yu Qing asked.

"Yes!"

Zhan Tian nodded.

At this moment, the Feather Qing of the Protoss had a glimmer of hope.

If he was allowed to attack for a minute, he felt that he might have a chance of winning.

After all, he is also a galaxy-level achievement of His Royal Highness of the Eternal Level, and his combat power is not weak, although he is not the most powerful of the Protoss, but he is not hopeless.

"Kill!"

The Protoss Yu Qing urged all kinds of origin artifacts on his body, and even held an ordinary supreme treasure long sword, and used his sword mastery to attack Zhantian.

Thundered!!!!

Countless attacks bombarded Zhan Tian's body, but Zhan Tian only held up his defense, did not take a step back at all, and did not make any counterattack.

Seconds passed.

No matter how Yu Qing attacked, he couldn't break through Zhantian's defenses.

"No, you have to fight hard, otherwise you will definitely die!"

Yu Qing began to burn the bloodline of the Protoss of life and most of his own life force, even if he would be abolished by casting the secret technique this time, it was better than dying.

"Die!"

Yu Qing slashed it with all his strength, and even sacrificed the origin of this ordinary supreme treasure, and the sword that broke out was faintly about to reach the combat power of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level.

However, even a true Supreme Highness couldn't hurt Zhan Tian.

Just because he's the son of the Epoch!

And Yu Qing is not the son of the era, and there is no son of the era among the gods, he can't imagine how powerful the son of the era is.

Rumble!!!!

A desperate sword bombarded Zhan Tian's body, and after casting this sword, Yu Qing quickly retreated.

The energy subsided, and Yu Qing looked ahead.

At this moment, a figure passed through the energy burst area and appeared in front of him in an instant.

A voice came at the same time—

"Your attack is too weak, isn't this the genius of the Thirteenth Cosmic Era? It's ridiculous! The minute is up, it's my turn!"

As soon as the words fell, Zhan Tian called.

Rumble!!!

Yu Qing's entire body was directly shattered, turning into countless fragments, and even the recovery ability of the Protoss could not be recovered, and even the last vitality was annihilated in an instant.

Spike!

Seeing this scene, those supremes were not surprised, and even the supremes of the Protoss only sighed, and they felt very normal.

Yu Qing is not even a Supreme Highness, how can he be the opponent of Zhan Tian, it is too normal and not enough to be killed in seconds.

Moreover, Zhan Tian is a master of the way of the gun, he didn't even have a gun, and he crushed Yuqing with one hand, and the gap between the two sides can already be seen.

"In the first battle, we won!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"The first battle, you should, we will hand over 100 star fields, and then start the second battle!" said the first god of the Protoss.

"Okay, since you want to end it quickly, let's start the second battle!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said with a smile.

Wow!

The Second Era of the Twelve Forces appeared, a woman with a chilling aura and a cyan sword.

And now in this era of the universe, it is a galaxy-level of the demon race.

This time the battle was not so slow, it was over just at the beginning.

Seeing a flash of sword light, the star of the demon clan was killed in an instant, and his body turned into countless dust.

"What a quick sword!"

Ye Tian saw clearly, this woman slashed out countless swords in an instant, and the swords and swords all slashed the Demon Clan's Galaxy level, and the sword light formed by these countless swords cut the Demon Clan's Galaxy level into countless pieces, which caused such a picture.

"In the second battle, we won again!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu smiled happily.

"Let's start the third battle!" said the First God of the Protoss.

"Alright, then start the third battle!" the Lord of the Ancient nodded.

Immediately, the Lord of the Yuan Gu consulted with the other Supremes.

"Whoever makes a move in this battle is just a formality anyway, this universe is still very young, in the early to middle stage of the cosmic era, it shouldn't be enough to give birth to a son of the era, just send one!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu proposed.

At this time, the Hades Venerable of the Hades civilization said: "Let my clan's Hades go to the east, he is the son of the era who is about to be born in the cosmic era, and he is at the level of the son of the era who has just been promoted, and his combat power is not as good as those powerful sons of the era, but there is no problem with the galaxy level of the other party in this cosmic era, and it is just right for him to experience more and see the world!"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu agreed.

Wow!

Hades of the Hades civilization appeared and appeared in the ring.

And Ye Tian also flew up and appeared in the ring.

"Ye Tian!"

Ye Tian also directly reported his name.

He saw that these sons of the era liked to report their real names, and they didn't like to say anything, it was estimated that the previous universe era didn't have any titles when their strength was not strong, and the titles belonged to the strong!

"Hades!"

Hades Dong also spoke.

"Let's go!"

With this sound, the battle between Ye Tian and Mingdong began.

"Die!"

A ray of light appeared in the center of Mingdong's eyebrows, piercing towards Ye Tian at an incredible speed.

In front of everyone's eyes, the light shone into Ye Tian's eyebrows.

"It's over!"

Styx muttered, and quickly turned to leave.

"Are you going to abstain?"

Ye Tian's voice came.

"What?"

Ming Dong was shocked, and stared back at Ye Tian, revealing an incredible look.

At this time, the supremes of the twelve forces were also slightly shocked.

The Lord of the Underworld also showed an incredible look: "Our Underworld specializes in cultivating souls, and the soul system of this universe is suppressed and very imperfect, how can he be able to block the soul attack of the Underworld?"
